unresolved: Scope ambiguity: the issue says 'the deserialize method' but JsonDeserializer declares TWO signatures — the 2-arg deserialize(JsonParser,DeserializationContext) (analyzed here) and the 3-arg deserialize(JsonParser,DeserializationContext,T intoValue). If the 3-arg overload's signature also changes, add all 3-arg overrides (e.g. CollectionDeserializer/MapDeserializer/UntypedObjectDeserializer/BeanDeserializer/StdDelegatingDeserializer/ReferenceTypeDeserializer/BeanAsArray*/TypeWrappedDeserializer 3-arg variants) and their call sites (SettableBeanProperty.deserializeWith, SetterlessProperty/InnerClassProperty.deserializeAndSet, etc.).

Same-name-different-method boundary: SettableBeanProperty.deserialize and SettableAnyProperty.deserialize are NOT JsonDeserializer overrides (those classes don't extend JsonDeserializer); they share the signature coincidentally and are included only as CALL SITES. If a real fix mirrors the signature change onto SettableBeanProperty.deserialize too, then its many callers (BeanDeserializer/BuilderBasedDeserializer _deserializeUsingPropertyBased & *PropertyBasedWith* methods, FactoryBasedEnumDeserializer._deserializeWithErrorWrapping, MapDeserializer/EnumMapDeserializer/ThrowableDeserializer/BeanAsArray* property loops, CreatorProperty/ObjectIdReferenceProperty/ManagedReferenceProperty/MergingSettableBeanProperty, ExternalTypeHandler._deserialize/_deserializeMissingToken) would also need changes — currently EXCLUDED.
util/TokenBuffer.java:deserialize is a coincidental same-signature helper on a JsonGenerator subclass (not a JsonDeserializer) — excluded; would only change if the fix deliberately renames/aligns it.

A few TEST overrides are anonymous inner classes or could not be tied to a named class with certainty; represented by enclosing test method (CollectionDeserTest:testExceptionWrapping, TestCustomEnumKeyDeserializer:testCustomEnumKeySerializerWithPolymorphic/modifyEnumDeserializer) or by bare 'deserialize' (JDKNumberDeserTest, ArrayDeserializationTest, BasicAnnotationsTest) — the file/line is confirmed but the symbol label is approximate.

PrimitiveArrayDeserializers nested class names (CharDeserializer/BooleanDeserializer/etc.) are inferred from element type; the file+method are confirmed but exact nested-class identifiers were not each individually re-read.
